data.title: Unfinished Iran war: Are there any winners? | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Explosions, US self-defense strikes, and renewed clashes near the Strait of Hormuz show how unresolved maritime leverage, Gulf vulnerability, and political deadlock could push the conflict further.
data.keywords: Iran,United States,Pakistan,iran missiles,Iran nuclear talks,iran us nuclear talks,UAE,Middle East,NATO,Gulf,strait of hormuz,Gulf States,The Media Line,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion,Operation Project Freedom
